name: Optical Smoke Detector
shortDescription: Photoelectric detector for early warning on smouldering fires.
longDescription: Optical (photoelectric) smoke detectors respond quickly to the large smoke particles produced by smouldering fires — the typical failure mode in offices, stores and cable voids. Available in conventional and addressable versions with a common mounting base, and supplied with drift compensation to reduce false alarms as the chamber ages.

images.alt: Optical Smoke Detector supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
